description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive striped pattern on its top surface, alternating between light gray stone and black bands. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern appearance. The stone surface appears slightly speckled, suggesting a granite or similar composite material. The block is thick and robust, with clean, sharp edges and a flat top, making it suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments. The striped design is visually striking and may serve both decorative and functional purposes, such as increasing visibility. There are no visible engravings, handles, or interactive features on the block.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with alternating light gray and black stripes on top and solid black sides, featuring a modern, robust appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped top surface with horizontal bands and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical orientation of the stripes and the solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows vertical stripes and a solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a visual and physical barrier
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No significant weathering is visible; the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or spaced as a standalone barrier
